VALID_STATUSES = {"active", "pending", "suspended"}
TERMINAL_STATUSES = {"error", "failed", "cancelled"}
ALLOWED_METHODS = {"GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "PATCH"}
SKIP_FILES = {".gitignore", ".env", "__pycache__", ".DS_Store"}


def process_status(status: str):
    if status in VALID_STATUSES:
        handle_valid(status)
    if status not in TERMINAL_STATUSES:
        proceed(status)


def categorize_size(size: int) -> str:
    if size in {1, 2, 3, 4, 5}:
        return "small"
    if size in {6, 7, 8, 9, 10}:
        return "medium"
    return "large"


def is_allowed_method(method: str) -> bool:
    return method in ALLOWED_METHODS


def should_skip_file(filename: str) -> bool:
    return filename in SKIP_FILES
